creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Try to install the version javavmwrapper-2.5_2 using pkg.
You will see the message:
[2/2] Extracting javavmwrapper-2.5_2: 100%
You may need to manually remove /usr/local/etc/javavm_opts.conf if it is no longer needed.
pkg: Fail to rename /usr/local/bin/.checkvms.y69ZCycWDUxf -> /usr/local/bin/checkvms: No such file or directory
